title: Audit
doc_html:
§348.5. Audit

            The district shall submit an annual financial report disclosing all receipts and disbursements to the Iberia Parish Council within one hundred twenty days following the end of each calender year.

            Acts 2025, No. 211, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
doc_text:
§348.5.  Audit
The district shall submit an annual financial report disclosing all receipts and
disbursements to the Iberia Parish Council within one hundred twenty days following the end
of each calender year.
Acts 2025, No. 211, §1, eff. June 8, 2025.
